mapper.select:
SELECT lr.*, m.title AS movie_title, u.nickname AS author_nickname, u.avatar_url AS author_avatar, CASE WHEN lk.id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS liked, CASE WHEN fv.id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS favorited FROM long_reviews lr LEFT JOIN movies m ON lr.movie_id = m.id LEFT JOIN users u ON lr.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN likes lk ON lk.target_type = 'LONG_REVIEW' AND lk.target_id = lr.id AND lk.user_id = #{currentUserId} LEFT JOIN favorites fv ON fv.target_type = 'LONG_REVIEW' AND fv.target_id = lr.id AND fv.user_id = #{currentUserId} WHERE lr.deleted_at IS NULL AND lr.status = 'ONLINE'
AND lr.movie_id = #{movieId}
ORDER BY (lr.like_count * 1 + lr.view_count * 0.1 + lr.reply_count * 2 + lr.favorite_count * 3) DESC
ORDER BY lr.created_at DESC

SELECT lr.*, m.title AS movie_title, u.nickname AS author_nickname, u.avatar_url AS author_avatar, CASE WHEN lk.id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS liked, CASE WHEN fv.id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS favorited FROM long_reviews lr LEFT JOIN movies m ON lr.movie_id = m.id LEFT JOIN users u ON lr.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN likes lk ON lk.target_type = 'LONG_REVIEW' AND lk.target_id = lr.id AND lk.user_id = #{currentUserId} LEFT JOIN favorites fv ON fv.target_type = 'LONG_REVIEW' AND fv.target_id = lr.id AND fv.user_id = #{currentUserId} WHERE lr.id = #{id} AND lr.deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT lr.id, lr.movie_id, lr.user_id, lr.title, SUBSTRING(lr.content_md, 1, 200) AS summary, lr.cover_url, lr.like_count, lr.favorite_count, lr.reply_count, lr.view_count, (lr.like_count * 1 + lr.view_count * 0.1 + lr.reply_count * 2 + lr.favorite_count * 3) AS hot_score, lr.created_at, m.title AS movie_title, m.poster_url AS movie_poster, u.nickname AS author_nickname, u.avatar_url AS author_avatar FROM long_reviews lr LEFT JOIN movies m ON lr.movie_id = m.id LEFT JOIN users u ON lr.user_id = u.id WHERE lr.deleted_at IS NULL AND lr.status = 'ONLINE' AND lr.is_featured = 1 ORDER BY lr.featured_at DESC, hot_score DESC

SELECT lr.*, m.title AS movie_title, u.nickname AS author_nickname, u.avatar_url AS author_avatar, CASE WHEN lk.id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS liked, CASE WHEN fv.id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS favorited FROM long_reviews lr LEFT JOIN movies m ON lr.movie_id = m.id LEFT JOIN users u ON lr.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN likes lk ON lk.target_type = 'LONG_REVIEW' AND lk.target_id = lr.id AND lk.user_id = #{userId} LEFT JOIN favorites fv ON fv.target_type = 'LONG_REVIEW' AND fv.target_id = lr.id AND fv.user_id = #{userId} WHERE lr.deleted_at IS NULL AND lr.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY lr.created_at DESC

SELECT lr.*, m.title AS movie_title, u.nickname AS author_nickname, u.avatar_url AS author_avatar, CASE WHEN lk.id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS liked, CASE WHEN fv2.id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS favorited FROM long_reviews lr INNER JOIN favorites fv ON fv.target_type = 'LONG_REVIEW' AND fv.target_id = lr.id AND fv.user_id = #{userId} LEFT JOIN movies m ON lr.movie_id = m.id LEFT JOIN users u ON lr.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN likes lk ON lk.target_type = 'LONG_REVIEW' AND lk.target_id = lr.id AND lk.user_id = #{userId} LEFT JOIN favorites fv2 ON fv2.target_type = 'LONG_REVIEW' AND fv2.target_id = lr.id AND fv2.user_id = #{userId} WHERE lr.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY fv.created_at DESC
